title: 10 Rupees
overview: Rambabu and Viswanatham are two friends who stuck in the problems at individual reasons. On the idea of Rambabu, they both decided to do a Scam named "PROJECT 10RUPEES" to overcome their problems.. What is the Scam they gonna do?
